title: Geopolitical tension between US and Iran sends oil up 6% and halts global stock markets
summary: The exchange of military attacks between the two countries causes a strong rebound in crude oil and a wave of risk aversion in the main global stock indices.

title: Palantir plummets 34%, TFF Group warns of another weak year and Securitize crashes 30% on the Ibex
summary: The combination of weak results, profit warnings and sharp corrections in technology and consumer firms paints a mixed outlook for corporate earnings.

title: Most Fed members support future rate hikes due to persistent inflation
summary: The US monetary authority remains cautious in the face of price stickiness, pointing to further tightening of credit conditions.

title: Spending on artificial intelligence and the tech rebound boost stock markets in Japan, Korea and Europe
summary: Optimism returns to Asian and European markets driven by semiconductor stocks and multi-million dollar investments in artificial intelligence.

title: AstraZeneca plunges on failed heart trial while Ionis and Revolution Medicines set the pace in biotech
summary: Volatility in the pharmaceutical sector intensifies, with large caps suffering from clinical trial failures and other firms attracting growth investors.

title: UniCredit raises its stake in Commerzbank to 44% and moves closer to a pan-European bank merger
summary: The Italian bank intensifies pressure on the German lender, accumulating shares and placing itself in an unbeatable position to negotiate an integration.

title: Fast Retailing earns 45.7% more in Q3 and raises guidance for fiscal year 2026
summary: International expansion and strong performance of its main brands allow the Japanese retailer to beat market estimates.

title: Kioxia rises 10% and Comet soars on increased demand for NAND memory chips
summary: Chip makers benefit from higher flash memory prices and upgrades by Wall Street analysts.

title: US earnings season kicks off with optimism and Citi bets on big tech stocks
summary: Strategists anticipate a solid set of earnings backed by consumption, with the technology and airline sectors in analysts' sights.

title: London stock market rises driven by Brooks Macdonald and Rubrik's investment in the UK
summary: The FTSE 100 joins the European rebound, boosted by earnings expectations at the asset manager and the tech giant's expansion plan in the country.

title: The ECB, the BOJ and an analysis of the 1997 crisis set the agenda for central banks and global stability
summary: Global monetary authorities face the dilemma of maintaining financial stability without curbing growth, against a backdrop of rising geopolitical tensions.

title: Pepco, Hyundai and the largest US egg producer show the strength of global consumption
summary: Consumer spending remains robust in several key sectors, from food to home technology and low-cost fashion.

title: Ibex bounces back and Spanish utilities like Repsol, Iberdrola and Telefónica resist Trump's onslaught better
summary: The Spanish index recovers from initial falls supported by the good performance of energy and telecommunications stocks.

title: China inflation rises only 1% in June as country tightens rare earth export restrictions
summary: The world's second-largest economy combines an unexpected moderation in prices with a strategic offensive on minerals used in technology.

title: Gas shortage in Europe and Russian diesel export ban worsen global energy crisis
summary: Restrictions on fuel exports and reduced natural gas flows create upward pressure on energy prices globally.

title: TPG and Blackstone seek more than $4 billion for Hologic unit in new wave of private equity deals
summary: Large private equity funds seek new investment opportunities as analysts debate the viability of the conglomerate business model.

title: Six bubble signals in markets warn of possible correction after all-time highs
summary: Investor euphoria and record index levels lead analysts to point to multiple overheating indicators in risk assets.

title: Bitcoin exceeds $60,000 after Warsh's words and Kalshi advances in new derivative products
summary: Federal Reserve statements and regulatory moves set the course for the cryptocurrency and digital derivatives market.

title: Covestro raises forecasts and Germany debates use of profits from its KfW development bank
summary: The German chemical sector shows optimism as government and regulators discuss how to manage the public entity's surpluses.

title: Japan suffers bearish pressure on yen and rise in long-term interest rates
summary: The Japanese economy shows signs of currency tension and a tightening of financial conditions in the sovereign bond market.
